body:
Regulation: B.C. Reg. 76/2026
Made under: Land Tax Deferment Act
Published in: No. 8 – B.C. Regs. 62 to 76, May 5, 2026
Deposit date: May 5, 2026

B.C. Reg. 76/2026, deposited May 5, 2026, under theLAND TAX DEFERMENT ACT[sections 8 and 9] andBUDGET MEASURES IMPLEMENTATION ACT, 2026[section 96]. Ministerial Order M196/2026, dated May 5, 2026. I, Brenda Bailey, Minister of Finance, order that, effective January 1, 2026, the Interest Rate Regulation, B.C. Reg. 75/2017, is amended as set out in the attached Schedule. — B. BAILEY,Minister of Finance. 1	The Interest Rate Regulation, B.C. Reg. 75/2017, is amended by adding the following section: Interest for 2026 and subsequent years 2(1)	For the purposes of sections 8 (3.3) and 9 (7) of theLand Tax Deferment Act, the interest rate, during each successive 3-month period beginning on January 1, April 1, July 1 and October 1 in every year, is 2% above the prime lending rate of the principal banker to the government on the 15th day of the month immediately preceding the 3-month period. (b)	calculated on the number of days since the last compounding of interest or, if no compounding has yet occurred, since the interest commencement date. Index Page|Previous Regulation|Cumulative Index Page Copyright © 2026: King's Printer, Victoria, British Columbia, Canada

minutes_briefs.title: BC Land Tax Deferment interest rate tied to prime plus 2% starting 2026
minutes_briefs.summary: The BC government has changed how interest is calculated on the Land Tax Deferment program. Starting January 1, 2026, the interest rate will be set at 2% above the prime lending rate of the government's main bank. The rate will be updated every three months (January 1, April 1, July 1, and October 1) based on the prime rate on the 15th day of the month before each new period. Interest is calculated daily since the last compounding date.

key_dates.label: BC Land Tax Deferment interest rate change takes effect (retroactive)
Next quarterly interest rate update (based on June 15 prime rate)
Next quarterly interest rate update (based on Sept 15 prime rate)
